## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:integration` passes (if the build path changed)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for new logic
- [ ] Docs updated (README / docs/ / `.env.example`) if behavior or config changed
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or justified)
- [ ] Rendered output stays fully self-contained; security controls not weakened
